programme.title: Kochie's Business Builders
programme.desc: This week we visit Umina Book Nook on the NSW Central Coast, where Kate has swapped SEO dashboards for shelves of novels. The shop has charm, loyal locals and great books, but Kate needs help turning browsers into buyers.

programme.title: NBC Today
programme.desc: International news and weather including interviews with newsmakers in the world of politics, business, media, entertainment and sport.

programme.title: My Reno Rules
programme.desc: Self-made billionaire Adrian Portelli has bought two Melbourne houses, to be renovated into showstopping homes by four keen teams. Two lucky Australian families will win the completed luxury homes.

programme.title: Sydney Weekender
programme.desc: Celebrate 80 years of racing at the Warburton Scone Horse Festival. Get out of your head & into your hands at the fun and creative Crock'd Pottery Class. Lots of adventures to be had in Coffs Harbour.

programme.title: House Calls to the Rescue
programme.desc: The team rescue a couple who have spent six months on a leaky deck and help a gardener who took out a swimming pool and created a titanic disaster.

programme.title: Harry's Practice
programme.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.

programme.title: Medical Rookies
programme.desc: Meet the young medical trainees at Westmead Hospital, Australia's biggest teaching hospital. Hosted by Jennifer Keyte.

programme.title: Better Homes and Gardens
programme.desc: Joh and Ed cook up a smaller, fast ham that's easier to baste than a full leg. Graham gives some terracotta pots Christmas cheer. Tara gets back to basics with rustic outdoor Christmas decorations.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson is house hunting in Cornwall with a married couple from Berkshire who have a budget of 450,000 pounds to find a rural Cornish idyll, complete with a five-bar gate.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Join Roo Irvine and experts Tim Weeks and Gary Pe as they go antique hunting in Naseby, in Northamptonshire, before heading to Derby for today's auction.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Dr Tricia Summerbee returns to work after her near-fatal heart attack. The invesatigation of a murder takes an unusal twist when it turns out the number one suspect has been dead for 15 years.

programme.title: McDonald & Dodds
programme.desc: When a young woman dies in a busy park in broad daylight, the uncovering of her identity leads DS Dodds to confront secrets from his own past.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Three hundred people are killed in one of the deadliest aviation accidents of all time after a fire breaks out on board Saudia Flight 163.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Join Roo Irvine and experts Tim Weeks and Gary Pe as they go antique hunting in Naseby, in Northamptonshire, before heading to Derby for today's auction.

programme.title: Our Town
programme.desc: Welcome to the Midwest of WA and do we have an awesome line-up for you this episode as we make our way around five Shire's that cover the 'best of the Midwest'. The Shires of Perenjori, Morawa, Mingenew, Three Springs and Carnamah - let's get our road trip underway!

programme.title: Australia's Deadliest
programme.desc: A surfer and a swimmer find themselves in the jaws of Australia's deadliest predators, while a vet faces the wrath of a native animal in her own backyard.

programme.title: Harry's Practice
programme.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.

programme.title: Medical Rookies
programme.desc: Meet the young medical trainees at Westmead Hospital, Australia's biggest teaching hospital. Hosted by Jennifer Keyte.

programme.title: Better Homes and Gardens
programme.desc: Joh and Ed cook up a smaller, fast ham that's easier to baste than a full leg. Graham gives some terracotta pots Christmas cheer. Tara gets back to basics with rustic outdoor Christmas decorations.

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: A battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test. Can one person, in one minute, win $1 million?

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: A battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test. Can one person, in one minute, win $1 million?

programme.title: Surf Patrol
programme.desc: Teenage thrillseekers tempt fate by jumping off the rocks at Avoca Beach, north of Sydney. At Southport, lifesavers race to save a man and his sons. Then, the Surfers Paradise Patrol Captain Peter Anderson receives a heart-warming visit from a secret admirer.

programme.title: Our Town
programme.desc: Karratha, Port Hedland, and Pannawonica is where our Pilbara focus will take us as we look at why people should visit, live, work, play and invest in one of Australia's most important regions.

programme.title: Australia's Deadliest
programme.desc: A young boy goes into cardiac arrest within seconds of being stung by a box jellyfish, while a German tourist is savagely attacked by dingoes.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson is house hunting in Cornwall with a married couple from Berkshire who have a budget of 450,000 pounds to find a rural Cornish idyll, complete with a five-bar gate.

programme.title: Harry's Practice
programme.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: A battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test. Can one person, in one minute, win $1 million?

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: A battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test. Can one person, in one minute, win $1 million?

programme.title: Medical Rookies
programme.desc: It's a tense time for Dr Brendan when complications in his first solo kidney transplant operation put the procedure in jeopardy. Meet Heather, a young nurse, who works in the world recognised live-in program for adolescents suffering anorexia nervosa.

programme.title: NBC Today
programme.desc: International news and weather including interviews with newsmakers in the world of politics, business, media, entertainment and sport.

programme.title: My Reno Rules
programme.desc: Judges Neale Whitaker, Julia Green and Simon Cohen tour both houses for the first time, after the teams' push to the finish. Meanwhile, Adrian Portelli delivers a surprise to keep motivation high.

programme.title: South Aussie with Cosi
programme.desc: This week on South Aussie with Cosi, we get excited for Gather Round, explore beautiful Customs House, showcase majestic Kangaroo Island, and celebrate everything SA has to offer.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Three hundred people are killed in one of the deadliest aviation accidents of all time after a fire breaks out on board Saudia Flight 163.

programme.title: Harry's Practice
programme.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.

programme.title: Medical Rookies
programme.desc: It's a tense time for Dr Brendan when complications in his first solo kidney transplant operation put the procedure in jeopardy. Meet Heather, a young nurse, who works in the world recognised live-in program for adolescents suffering anorexia nervosa.

programme.title: Better Homes and Gardens
programme.desc: Joh, Charlie and James transform a house stuck in the 1980s; Adam and Melissa visit an old chocolate factory that's been converted to apartments; Karen makes lemon and cumin barbecue chicken.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: With early retirement on the cards, this episode's couple have set their sights on a relocation to North Wales and Jules Hudson is on hand to help them find the perfect property for their 600k budget.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Danny presents today's Bargain Hunt from Harrogate, North Yorkshire. Izzie Balmer and John Cameron guide the Red and Blue teams, as they go in search of bargains to sell at auction in Beverley.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown investigates when the son of a local aeronautics magnate is murdered, while Lady Felicia loses her singing voice.

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.sub-title: In the Blink of an Eye
programme.desc: Lynley and Havers investigate the death of a paparazzi photographer, Peter Rooker, who was found beaten and shot in Soho, London. Was it someone who didn't want to be photographed? The case leads them all the way to a massacre in Bosnia in 1995 and brings tragedy for Lynley when Helen gets involved in the investigation.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Ogden and Margaret attend a psychic and fortune telling fair and when a body is found in an alley with the death tarot card, Murdoch is convinced there's a link.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown investigates when the son of a local aeronautics magnate is murdered, while Lady Felicia loses her singing voice.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Danny presents today's Bargain Hunt from Harrogate, North Yorkshire. Izzie Balmer and John Cameron guide the Red and Blue teams, as they go in search of bargains to sell at auction in Beverley.

programme.desc: A young boy goes into cardiac arrest within seconds of being stung by a box jellyfish, while a German tourist is savagely attacked by dingoes.

programme.desc: Joh, Charlie and James transform a house stuck in the 1980s; Adam and Melissa visit an old chocolate factory that's been converted to apartments; Karen makes lemon and cumin barbecue chicken.

programme.desc: A battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test. Can one person, in one minute, win $1 million?

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: A battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test. Can one person, in one minute, win $1 million?

programme.title: Surf Patrol
programme.desc: Lifesavers battle wild seas to rescue a girl who's fully clothed and in serious danger. Then, a worried grandmother fears the worst when her two young boys go missing.

programme.title: Our Town
programme.desc: Vibrant and rejuvenated, Fremantle is seeing a few changes at the moment as this coastal city has \.

programme.title: Australia's Deadliest
programme.desc: A grandmother wakes up to her worst nightmare when she discovers a croc attacking her friend, while a young girl loses her eye to an aggressive bird.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: With early retirement on the cards, this episode's couple have set their sights on a relocation to North Wales and Jules Hudson is on hand to help them find the perfect property for their 600k budget.

programme.title: Medical Rookies
programme.desc: Follow the post-operative recovery of a kidney transplant donor George, who gave his kidney to save his wife's life.

programme.title: NBC Today
programme.desc: International news and weather including interviews with newsmakers in the world of politics, business, media, entertainment and sport.

programme.title: House of Wellness
programme.desc: Crawf shows off his hula hoop moves, Steve Moneghetti opens up about his passion for 'Run For the Kids', Guy Leech shares his lifesaving mission, and comedian Diana Nguyen gets everyone on their feet.
